#  Download Drawings (Android) 
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * 'Read Only' or higher permissions on the Drawings tool.
  * **Additional Information:**
    * You can test which drawings have been downloaded to your device already by turning on Airplane Mode on your device and navigating to the Drawings tool on the Procore app to view any downloaded drawings.
    * If you or another team member marks up a drawing while offline, or someone uploads a new version, your device will need to re-download the changes with an Internet or network connection in order to view the the most current information.


##  Steps 
#### Download Drawings by Discipline
  1. Navigate to the project's **Drawings** tool using an Android mobile device.
  2. If your drawings include multiple areas, tap the area that you want to download drawings from.
  3. Tap **Download**   
_Note:_ All drawings in the selected discipline will be downloaded.   
![Drawings Android Download Drawings By Discipline](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/ea85dd4316c432b98082551256f7fcd1/fc2e70ed576982f01f3bc91c0b19b467/drawings-android-download-drawings-by-discipline.png?fm=webp)


#### Download Drawings Individually
  1. Navigate to the project's **Drawings** tool using an Android mobile device.  
_Note:_ Drawings not yet downloaded to your device will be marked with a download 
  2. Tap **Download**   
![Drawings Android Download Drawings](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/bc5aa6f8699924c4e54304c23dff15e5/840c9ece6bea563b59a7f5eae18bc660/drawings-android-download-drawings.png?fm=webp)  
_Note:_ The individual drawings you selected will be downloaded.


## See Also
  * [Sync and Download Drawings (Android)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-android/tutorials/sync-and-download-drawings-android)
  * [View Drawings (Android)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-android/tutorials/view-drawings-android)
  * [Drawings (Android) - Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-android/permissions)
title: Download Drawings (Android)
description: How to download and view drawings from the Drawings tool using an Android mobile device.
